content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09C","process_rule":"1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09C named J09C_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
    1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
    2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
    If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
    Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Export the final data from the table as CSV file named J09C including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
8. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
9. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data."}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09C named J09C_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
    1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
    2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
    If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
    Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Export the final data from the table as CSV file named J09C including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
8. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
9. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data.

args.sqlite_command: CREATE TABLE J09C_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOURS LIKE 'J09C%'

args.sqlite_command: CREATE TABLE J09C_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09C%'
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT

UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE 
    WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM decision_table d2 WHERE d2.HAUS = J09C_temp.HAUS) < 3 THEN 'KSA'
    ELSE 'EVU'
END
UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0

CREATE TABLE J09C_joined AS 
SELECT 
    J09C_temp.*,
    eablg.`Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.` as MR_Doc_No,
    eablg.Installation,
    net_master.TITLE,
    net_master.FORENAME,
    net_master.SURNAME,
    net_master.STREET,
    net_master.STREETNO,
    net_master.CITY1,
    net_master.CITY2,
    net_master.POST_CODE1,
    net_master.EMAIL as NET_EMAIL,
    sales_master.TITLE as SALES_TITLE,
    sales_master.FORENAME as SALES_FORENAME,
    sales_master.SURNAME as SALES_SURNAME,
    sales_master.STREET as SALES_STREET,
    sales_master.STREETNO as SALES_STREETNO,
    sales_master.CITY1 as SALES_CITY1,
    sales_master.CITY2 as SALES_CITY2,
    sales_master.POST_CODE1 as SALES_POST_CODE1,
    sales_master.EMAIL as SALES_EMAIL
FROM J09C_temp
JOIN eablg ON J09C_temp.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation
LEFT JOIN net_master ON J09C_temp.EQUNR = net_master.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN sales_master ON J09C_temp.EQUNR = sales_master.EQUNR

UPDATE J09C_joined SET 
    TITLE = CASE WHEN SALES_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_TITLE ELSE TITLE END,
    FORENAME = CASE WHEN SALES_FORENAME IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_FORENAME ELSE FORENAME END,
    SURNAME = CASE WHEN SALES_SURNAME IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_SURNAME ELSE SURNAME END,
    STREET = CASE WHEN SALES_STREET IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_STREET ELSE STREET END,
    STREETNO = CASE WHEN SALES_STREETNO IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_STREETNO ELSE STREETNO END,
    CITY1 = CASE WHEN SALES_CITY1 IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_CITY1 ELSE CITY1 END,
    CITY2 = CASE WHEN SALES_CITY2 IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_CITY2 ELSE CITY2 END,
    POST_CODE1 = CASE WHEN SALES_POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_POST_CODE1 ELSE POST_CODE1 END,
    EMAIL = CASE WHEN SALES_EMAIL IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_EMAIL ELSE NET_EMAIL END

UPDATE J09C_joined SET 
    TITLE = CASE WHEN SALES_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_TITLE ELSE TITLE END,
    FORENAME = CASE WHEN SALES_FORENAME IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_FORENAME ELSE FORENAME END,
    SURNAME = CASE WHEN SALES_SURNAME IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_SURNAME ELSE SURNAME END,
    STREET = CASE WHEN SALES_STREET IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_STREET ELSE STREET END,
    STREETNO = CASE WHEN SALES_STREETNO IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_STREETNO ELSE STREETNO END,
    CITY1 = CASE WHEN SALES_CITY1 IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_CITY1 ELSE CITY1 END,
    CITY2 = CASE WHEN SALES_CITY2 IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_CITY2 ELSE CITY2 END,
    POST_CODE1 = CASE WHEN SALES_POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_POST_CODE1 ELSE POST_CODE1 END,
    EMAIL = CASE WHEN SALES_EMAIL IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_EMAIL ELSE NET_EMAIL END

CREATE TABLE J09C_final AS 
SELECT 
    J09C_temp.`Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.` as `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`,
    J09C_temp.HAUS,
    J09C_temp.ANLAGE,
    J09C_temp.ME_MA_ID,
    J09C_temp.EQUNR,
    J09C_temp.HOUSE_NUM1,
    J09C_temp.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
    CASE WHEN sales_master.TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN sales_master.TITLE ELSE net_master.TITLE END as TITLE,
    CASE WHEN sales_master.FORENAME IS NOT NULL THEN sales_master.FORENAME ELSE net_master.FORENAME END as FORENAME,
    CASE WHEN sales_master.SURNAME IS NOT NULL THEN sales_master.SURNAME ELSE net_master.SURNAME END as SURNAME,
    CASE WHEN sales_master.STREET IS NOT NULL THEN sales_master.STREET ELSE net_master.STREET END as STREET,
    CASE WHEN sales_master.STREETNO IS NOT NULL THEN sales_master.STREETNO ELSE net_master.STREETNO END as STREETNO,
    CASE WHEN sales_master.CITY1 IS NOT NULL THEN sales_master.CITY1 ELSE net_master.CITY1 END as CITY1,
    CASE WHEN sales_master.CITY2 IS NOT NULL THEN sales_master.CITY2 ELSE net_master.CITY2 END as CITY2,
    CASE WHEN sales_master.POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL THEN sales_master.POST_CODE1 ELSE net_master.POST_CODE1 END as POST_CODE1,
    CASE WHEN sales_master.EMAIL IS NOT NULL THEN sales_master.EMAIL ELSE net_master.EMAIL END as EMAIL
FROM J09C_temp
JOIN eablg ON J09C_temp.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation
LEFT JOIN net_master ON J09C_temp.EQUNR = net_master.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN sales_master ON J09C_temp.EQUNR = sales_master.EQUNR

args.sqlite_command:
CREATE TABLE J09C_with_mr AS 
SELECT 
    J09C_temp.*,
    eablg.`Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.` as MR_Doc_No,
    net_master.TITLE as NET_TITLE,
    net_master.FORENAME as NET_FORENAME,
    net_master.SURNAME as NET_SURNAME,
    net_master.STREET as NET_STREET,
    net_master.STREETNO as NET_STREETNO,
    net_master.CITY1 as NET_CITY1,
    net_master.CITY2 as NET_CITY2,
    net_master.POST_CODE1 as NET_POST_CODE1,
    net_master.EMAIL as NET_EMAIL,
    sales_master.TITLE as SALES_TITLE,
    sales_master.FORENAME as SALES_FORENAME,
    sales_master.SURNAME as SALES_SURNAME,
    sales_master.STREET as SALES_STREET,
    sales_master.STREETNO as SALES_STREETNO,
    sales_master.CITY1 as SALES_CITY1,
    sales_master.CITY2 as SALES_CITY2,
    sales_master.POST_CODE1 as SALES_POST_CODE1,
    sales_master.EMAIL as SALES_EMAIL
FROM J09C_temp
JOIN eablg ON J09C_temp.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation
LEFT JOIN net_master ON J09C_temp.EQUNR = net_master.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN sales_master ON J09C_temp.EQUNR = sales_master.EQUNR

CREATE TABLE J09C_final AS 
SELECT 
    MR_Doc_No as `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`,
    HAUS,
    ANLAGE,
    ME_MA_ID,
    EQUNR,
    HOUSE_NUM1,
    ENTSCHEIDUNG,
    CASE WHEN SALES_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_TITLE ELSE NET_TITLE END as TITLE,
    CASE WHEN SALES_FORENAME IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_FORENAME ELSE NET_FORENAME END as FORENAME,
    CASE WHEN SALES_SURNAME IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_SURNAME ELSE NET_SURNAME END as SURNAME,
    CASE WHEN SALES_STREET IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_STREET ELSE NET_STREET END as STREET,
    CASE WHEN SALES_STREETNO IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_STREETNO ELSE NET_STREETNO END as STREETNO,
    CASE WHEN SALES_CITY1 IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_CITY1 ELSE NET_CITY1 END as CITY1,
    CASE WHEN SALES_CITY2 IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_CITY2 ELSE NET_CITY2 END as CITY2,
    CASE WHEN SALES_POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_POST_CODE1 ELSE NET_POST_CODE1 END as POST_CODE1,
    CASE WHEN SALES_EMAIL IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_EMAIL ELSE NET_EMAIL END as EMAIL
FROM J09C_with_mr

args.sql_query: SELECT `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, CITY1, CITY2, POST_CODE1, EMAIL FROM J09C_final

args.email: Please find attached the processed data for process J09C, including meter reading document numbers, house information, equipment details, decision status (KSA/EVU), and customer contact information. The data has been prepared according to the specified rules and is ready for review by the EVU team.
